name: Seas of Hydra
developer: Caelen Trevino, Nicholas Schulz, Xavier Cipriano, Jake Brooks, Aspen Causey
short_description: “Seas of Hydra” is a cozy fishing survival game that takes place in a fantasy realm where the player is tasked with satisfying the eternal hunger of The Lighthouse Turtle. Catch unique sea creatures to sell to the local Seagull merchant to improve your fishing arsenal and sate the turtle’s hunger!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Seas of Hydra! Sent to a watery world, the player, Hadwritz Yothich, fishes off of a friendly sea turtle in exchange for feeding it. Looks like you have some work to do!

Use your trusty rod to scavenge the seas for various fish, all with their own behaviors and quirks. Some may be quick, slow, consistent, or random. All you need to do is hook them to find out.

Your new turtle friend doesn't eat fish, but luckily someone does. A seagull has set up shop on his reliable sea craft. He will willingly trade your fish for upgrades, accessories, and most importantly, turtle food. You’ll need it as your turtle companion grows ever hungrier.

Find many unique fish, upgrade your rod, and see how long you can last in this relaxing fishing game.

This game was developed and produced entirely by an aspiring team of high school students in a little over half a year. Any support helps us achieve our dreams of becoming successful game developers.
